case_title: BRADLEY, ARTURO DBA B & B TRANSMISSIONS VS GRUNDY, REUBEN JR.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GRUNDY, REUBEN JR.
